sentences.text: Thanks to the 1,400+ replies in the first 12 hours!
I read all of them last night, and another 300+ came in overnight that I’ll catch up on today.
Here’s the Top 10 stack rank from your feedback so far, along with where we stand on each: 1) Make Google Workspace integrations work more reliably: This is the clear #1 request, and all of us agree.
On it.
A set of improvements went into Gemini Spark recently, but this needs to be much better across the entire app.
2) More reliable tool calling: Strongly agree.
We know we need to improve here, and you should expect to see noticeable gains soon.
3) Projects & folder organization for chats: Notebooks have been a positive step, but not enough.
We’ll rethink this UX and will report back.

4) Add MCPs and Custom Skills: We’ve rolled out early support in Gemini Spark with custom MCPs, custom skills, and a few connected apps, but we're working to make this more widely available and adding more MCPs.
5) Deep Research improvements: You asked for export reports to NotebookLM and the ability to switch between Deep Research mode and Flash/Pro models in the same chat.
I wasn’t aware of these pain points.
Both are good ideas, and we’ll figure something out.
6) Remove watermarks from Nano Banana: We’ll chat about this later today to see where we can make adjustments while navigating AI rules, which vary by country.
7) Edit any message in chat history: On it.
We’ll aim to do this, plus keep our existing chat branching feature.
8) Improve in-app voice dictation accuracy: We're prioritizing this area overall.
We’ll dig into these specific replies, and I might DM a few of you to get more info if we need it.
9) Fix mobile app scrolling bugs: Doing this.
10) Fix "Celebrity Likeness" guardrails: We plan to keep this as-is right now.
Thanks again!

paragraphs.zh: 感谢大家在前 12 小时里发来的 1,400+ 条回复！我昨晚把这些都看完了，夜里又新增了 300+ 条，我今天会继续跟上。以下是根据你们截至目前的反馈整理出的 Top 10 优先级排序，以及我们在每一项上的进展：1）让 Google Workspace 集成（integrations）运行得更稳定可靠：这是非常明确的头号请求，我们所有人都同意。已经在做了。最近 Gemini Spark 已上线一组改进，但整个 app 在这方面还需要好得多。2）让 tool calling 更可靠：非常同意。我们知道这里需要改进，你们应该很快就会看到明显提升。3）为聊天提供 Projects 和文件夹组织：Notebooks 是积极的一步，但还不够。我们会重新思考这部分 UX（用户体验），并再向大家汇报。4）加入 MCPs 和 Custom Skills：我们已经在 Gemini Spark 中推出了早期支持，包括自定义 MCPs、自定义 skills，以及少量已连接的 apps，但我们正在努力让这些能力更广泛可用，并增加更多 MCPs。5）改进 Deep Research：你们希望能把报告导出到 NotebookLM，并且能在同一个 chat 中切换 Deep Research mode 与 Flash/Pro models。我之前并不了解这些痛点。这两个想法都很好，我们会想办法解决。6）移除 Nano Banana 的水印：我们今天晚些时候会讨论这个问题，看看在遵守 AI 规则的前提下，哪些地方可以调整；而这些规则会因国家而异。7）允许编辑 chat 历史中的任意消息：已经在做了。我们的目标是实现这一点，同时保留现有的 chat branching 功能。8）提升 app 内语音听写的准确率：总体上我们正在优先处理这个领域。我们会深入查看这些具体回复，如果需要更多信息，我可能会私信你们中的几位。9）修复 mobile app 的滚动 bug：正在做。10）修复 “Celebrity Likeness” 护栏（guardrails）：目前我们计划暂时保持现状。再次感谢大家！
